idea-plugin.name: Discord Rich Presence
idea-plugin.description:
Displays your JetBrains IDE activity as Discord Rich Presence.

Features

  • Shows the IDE logo and version as the large icon
  • Shows the language icon of the file you are editing
  • Displays the project name and current Git branch
  • Displays the name of the file being edited
  • Shows continuous playtime since the IDE was opened
  • Reconnect notification when Discord is closed and reopened

Supported Languages

Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, React (JSX/TSX), Python, Go, C, C++, C#, PHP, Ruby, Rust, SQL/SQLite, HTML, CSS, Markdown, JSON, YAML, Shell/Bash, Zsh, PowerShell, Dockerfile

Requirements

  • JetBrains IDE 2023.3 or later
  • Discord desktop app (must be running)

Notes

  • No configuration required — works automatically when Discord is running.
  • If Discord is not running, the plugin starts silently without errors.
  • A notification with a Reconnect button is shown if Discord disconnects.
